{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202224019A461ABAF13B349E494"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562624441803899710","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常的精彩，人物刻画饱满，主角配角，好人坏人形象生动，都有各自的特点所在，剧情紧奏，不拖拉，很好看!很精彩!强推!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760820555,"group_id":"7339492395924343833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1OG4C+I8M3BbmRiAI+wukg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/82add1f0b5cc47418bd04748e2526d65~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708053&x-signature=5NECgNefGQJZXVHccIx8XTaHC3U%3D","user_id":"388601778802505","user_name":"北苍城的羊小姐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"388601778802505","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7339492395924343833","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主——主角无cp——世界内容成分复杂】
本人是个书名废！简介废！还望请见谅！〒▽〒（双手合十。）
以下是简介内容：
   时珂在路上被一个“路过”的系统助手给“单杀”
     系统助手‘业绩’+1……
……
好消息：时珂穿越了
坏消息：系统助手不怎么靠谱
––
好消息：他改变了其他人原有的命运轨迹
坏消息：没跟他说这世界不止这一个世界线啊！
—最后—
时珂：我其实不想成为？？？？的，说实话说出来我自己都不信
—小剧场—
叶修和苏沐秋在讨论着，是不是应该叫他弟来解救一下他。
白发青年将一旁准备上去帮忙的黑发青年拉走。
棕发青年揪住他的衣领，让他给出骗黑发青年的说法
白风衣的青年将时珂堵在墙角，控诉他不经过他同意，直接将他踹下列车。
带着蓝色玉盘耳饰的青年，在外围微笑看着这一切。
不远处还有一位深紫长发青年带着人在遥遥望着里面的情况。
云端之上，几位穿着斗篷的白发身影，向着他挥手，做着告别。
【内含私设，脑子一热的产物，剧情慢热（大概），想到哪里就写，会更新，但时间不确定。毕竟是个新手，前几章可能有点‘无聊’加点‘莫名其妙’还请见谅。可能有ooc的情况。（QAQ）】","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o97937260a3d2c9fb148efdb81e2206d2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"修续木","author_id":"","book_id":"7339492395924343833","book_name":"综：说好的体验不是这样的！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#98a8d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7339492401997677081","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"137753"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"46","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o97937260a3d2c9fb148efdb81e2206d2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779301360&x-signature=X1L9EGD8lf2sE0OpdV%2FoREYDWlk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3369342028220327","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032202224019A461ABAF13B349E494"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":13731,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":26325,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":10},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7562631230783259454","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得真好，每一个人物都塑造得非常完美，生动，剧情逻辑分明，节奏也很好，书荒时刻，让我一口气看到现在"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1760820480,"group_id":"7339492395924343833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/9XvMA6MqO4RnZyZ1UcB5e2LmGVuR8QUrPcp45BpSNW","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4135728937443786","user_name":"星星点点的容馨儿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4135728937443786","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7339492395924343833","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主——主角无cp——世界内容成分复杂】
